objective: Close F-0090 by making resource downloadAvailable truthful and implementing a private original-file download addressed only by resource publicId for existing super_admin/content_admin users, with authorization before metadata or file access, strict resource object identity and realpath containment checks, size/hash verification, safe attachment headers, no-store responses, redacted audit, and a content-admin UI action. Preserve student/citation privacy and all upload, conversion, publish, index, permission, schema, and Provider semantics.
blockedFiles: schema/migration, real database/data access, dependency, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR, force-push, non-canonical remote, Subagent, kernel/guard/smoke
new roles or entitlement, anonymous/student/ops_admin-only download, objectKey/path exposure, public URL, upload/conversion/publish/index mutation, physical delete, or other finding

authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: RAG module 6.5 and CONTENT-RES-UX-08 require private original-file download for authorized content staff while students see citation metadata only.
authoritativeChainEvidence.caller: AdminResourceKnowledgeManagement currently renders downloadAvailable but has no executable download action.
authoritativeChainEvidence.route: resources routes have no publicId download endpoint; the paper-asset download route provides the established private binary response pattern.
authoritativeChainEvidence.serviceRepository: rag runtime already resolves super_admin/content_admin; repository can project the exact stored identity without exposing it to JSON.
authoritativeChainEvidence.storage: local-paper-asset-storage already owns resource object-key creation but only exports a paper-asset-specific strict reader.
authoritativeChainEvidence.rootCause: The capability flag was added without the authorization, private byte-delivery, and UI command path needed to make it truthful.

securityContract: authorize super_admin or content_admin before repository, file reader, or resource-specific audit access
locate only by normalized resource publicId and keep objectStoragePath, absolute path, contentHash, and internal errors private
validate exact dev/resource/profession/YYYYMM/sha256.extension identity, canonical realpath containment, regular-file type, size, and SHA-256
return only a complete no-store attachment with controlled MIME, safe Content-Disposition, exact length, and nosniff after redacted audit succeeds
keep anonymous, student, and ops_admin-only fail closed without repository or file access; do not support Range
UI uses only the protected encoded publicId route and revokes temporary blob URLs
invalidatedBy: new role, entitlement, schema, dependency, Provider, mechanism, or real data access
authorization after metadata access or inability to prove namespace, realpath, size, hash, and audit fail-closed behavior

resumeAnchor.task: After guardian approval, implement and close the private resource download path, then resume the next separate RC-06 finding
resumeAnchor.condition: no role or scope expansion, schema, real database, dependency, Provider, external service, upload/conversion mutation, public storage, mechanism, or unrelated finding
